title: Toward a Non-Commutative Residuated Lattice from Quaternion Multiplication (repository)
description: Repository accompanying the paper 'Toward a Non-Commutative Residuated Lattice from Quaternion Multiplication' (Zenodo DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19561407). Contains LaTeX source, compiled PDF, and verification scripts for the Quaternionic Trilemma theorem. The paper investigates whether the Hamilton product of quaternions can serve as a genuinely non-commutative conjunction for the G-lattice introduced in the companion paper. Positive results on V = [0,1] x [-1,1]^3: bilateral identity, associativity, emergent non-commutativity. Fundamental obstructions: Hamilton product not closed/not monotone on V; no compatible total order on H; four independent impossibility results rule out any non-trivial compatible lattice order on B^4. Main theorem: for any monoidal operation on a subset of V, at most two of {associativity, non-commutativity, compatible lattice order} can hold simultaneously.
